---
title: "Extract features"
subtitle: "`extract_features()` returns feature objects, plans, recipes, timelines, and alignments."
sidebar: start
---

## Run one feature

`extract_features()` builds a plan, converts it to a recipe, executes it, and returns an `ExtractFeaturesResult`.

```{python}
from natural_features.workflows import extract_features

result = extract_features(
    "The scene opens on a quiet room.",
    features=["text.tokenize", "language.surface"],
)

words = result.features["text.tokenize"]
surface = result.features["language.surface"]
{
    "result_type": type(result).__name__,
    "feature_keys": sorted(result.features),
    "recipe": result.recipe,
    "event_count": len(words),
    "dense_shape": surface.values.shape,
}
```

## Inspect the event object

```{python}
{
    "schema": words.schema,
    "metadata": words.metadata,
    "onsets": words.onset_s.tolist(),
    "offsets": words.offset_s.tolist(),
    "labels": words.label.tolist(),
}
```

## Align one output to another

`language.surface` is a dense `FeatureSeries`. `text.tokenize` is an `EventSeries`. Alignment records how rows in one object map to the timeline implied by the other.

```{python}
aligned = result.align_to(
    "text.tokenize",
    features="language.surface",
)

aligned.to_dataframe().loc[
    :,
    [
        "source_name",
        "source_row",
        "source_onset_s",
        "target_name",
        "target_index_start",
        "target_time_s",
    ],
]
```

The source objects are unchanged. The alignment is a separate object that can become rows, or can annotate event outputs when the source is event-shaped.

## Return a recipe instead

```{python}
extract_features(
    "The scene opens on a quiet room.",
    features=["text.tokenize"],
    format="recipe",
)
```

## Refuses to

- `format` must be one of `features`, `result`, `recipe`, `plan`, or `table`.
- `align_to()` requires a known timeline or temporal feature output.
- Table output requires the storage extra because it uses pandas.

## Read next

[Unified workflow](../concepts/unified-workflow.qmd) · [Feature objects](../concepts/feature-objects.qmd)
